name: Campement Akka Nait Sidi
description: At the VIP traditional touareg Campsite located in Akka Nait Sidi, Tissint (Anti-Atlas), you will have a chance to sleep in the spectacular, traditional, 'Khaima' tents in style (comfortable beds and bedding, showers and toilets on site, dinner tent). The campsite is located in the middle of a beautiful, grandiose and calming desert landscape, that Sylvain and his staff will be delighted to guide you amongst.

name: Souk El Had d'Agadir
description: One of the biggest souks in Morocco, this authentic traditional market features over 6,000 shops spread over 13 hectares in the center of Agadir. Souk El Had draws crowds of locals and travelers to its troves of spices, fruit, furniture and clothing. Here, you can purchase grade-A argan oil, bargain when buying fine leather goods and enjoy the best Moroccan mint tea in the city. The market is open on most days of the week—be sure to check before you go. You might want to join historic and cultural tours of Agadir which typically include this bustling souk in their itineraries. – Tripadvisor

name: Paradise Valley Agadir
description: Paradise Valley is a breathtaking oasis nestled in the High Atlas Mountains near Agadir, Morocco. This serene haven is renowned for its stunning natural beauty, characterized by lush greenery, palm trees, cascading waterfalls, and crystal-clear natural pools. Visitors can hike along scenic trails, swim in the refreshing rock pools, and revel in the tranquil atmosphere, making it an ideal retreat for nature lovers and those seeking a peaceful escape from city life.

name: UpcycleMo
description: UpcycleMo, is à social co-operative that sustainably transforms tires into trendy decor objects as well as into indoor and outdoor furniture. It is our life dream, through which we aim to improve the social, economic and environmental well-being of our community. UpcycleMo est une coopérative de développement durable, qui transforme les déchets de pneus en objets de décoration tendance, ainsi qu'en mobilier d'intérieur et d'extérieur. C'est notre rêve de vie, à travers lequel nous visons à améliorer le bien-être social, économique et environnemental de notre communauté.
address: N10 Artisanal Complex Kasbat Souss, Ben Sergaou, Agadir 80000 Morocco
